workflowSummaries.name: Route Inventory Agent
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Regenerate route inventory and reconcile unexpected route additions/removals before compliance claims.

workflowSummaries.name: Experience Vitals Agent
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Address route-tier vitals budget breaches and adjust baseline drift with explicit approvals.
issues: 3 non-success runs in the last 7 days

workflowSummaries.name: Cognitive Load Agent
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Reduce public-route cognitive density and CTA competition before weak chunking becomes chronic.

workflowSummaries.name: Cognitive Fluency Calibration Dispatch
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Use the monthly calibration packet to drive human-depth Page Experience Auditor review on the worst-scoring routes.

workflowSummaries.name: Cognitive Calibration Loop
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Use quarterly deterministic-vs-auditor deltas to tune scoring weights and keep calibration drift controlled.

workflowSummaries.name: Experience Portfolio Rollup
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Use the portfolio rollup as the single triage board for cross-agent issues and route the suggested mitigation to an owner immediately.
issues: 3 non-success runs in the last 7 days

workflowSummaries.name: Luxury Page Sentinel
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Triage blocking incidents by dimension and burn down quarantine debt before expiry.
issues: 116 non-success runs in the last 7 days

workflowSummaries.name: Dashboard Behavior Baseline Agent
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Validate dashboard contracts and probe credentials, then address route-specific regressions.
issues: 1 non-success runs in the last 7 days

workflowSummaries.name: Trust Integrity Agent
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Resolve parity/title/landmark contract failures before certifying dashboard trust posture.
issues: 1 non-success runs in the last 7 days

workflowSummaries.name: Trust Escalation Agent
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Route trust violations to owning teams quickly and escalate P0 findings within the SLA window.
issues: no completed runs in last 7 days

workflowSummaries.name: Journey Synthetic Agent
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Monitor tier-1 journey step percentiles and resolve high abandonment-risk steps before conversion impact.
issues: no completed runs in last 7 days

workflowSummaries.name: Trust Daily Report
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Use daily trust telemetry to surface contract drift quickly and keep remediation ownership explicit.
issues: 2 non-success runs in the last 7 days

workflowSummaries.name: Trust Weekly Issues Report
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Review trust issue clusters and convert repeated failures into backlog remediation with owners.

workflowSummaries.name: Trust Monthly Trends Report
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Use monthly trust trend deltas to ratchet contracts and prevent drift from becoming normalized.

workflowSummaries.name: Experience Seeding Checklist
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Resolve failed dispatches and keep weekly seeding evidence fresh so monitoring remains auditable.

workflowSummaries.name: Probe Account Reset
workflowSummaries.recommendation: Reset synthetic probe account capacity before route coverage degrades from limit-triggered skips.
issues: 2 non-success runs in the last 7 days
